emails.theme: Mushroom Pantry Stuffer: Seven Varieties, One Jar-Packed Pantry
emails.product: Mushroom Pantry Stuffer (7 Varieties, Quart Size)
emails.shortDescription: Product spotlight on the Mushroom Pantry Stuffer (7 one-quart jars: Maitake, Shiitake, Oyster, Royal Trumpet, Champignon, Portabella, Lion's Mane). No blog promo, product is the whole focus. Meet-the-7-varieties grid, jar trio, shelf-stable benefits.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 1: focus entirely on the product, do NOT promote the blog. Linked post did not arrive in Slack; built from product page. No invented price.
emails.creativeDirection: HHF green/cream palette. Hero (all 7 jars) + 2-col 7-variety grid + jar trio + shelf-stable benefits checklist. Unique layout vs Jun 30 bell peppers jug spotlight.

emails.theme: Celebrating 250 Years of Independence: Our Most Loved
emails.product: Best sellers: Dried Vegetable Soup, Vegetable Sampler (15 zip), Backpacking Kit (18 zip), Deluxe Sampler (32 zip), Organic Vegetable Pantry Stuffer, Deluxe Fruit Assortment
emails.shortDescription: 4th of July / 250th anniversary email featuring the most loved best sellers (6 products) for celebrations and pantry stocking. Patriotic hero, HHF green product CTAs, 2-col grid each with Shop Now.
emails.notes: Client brief Jul 1. 250 years of American independence theme. Organic Pantry Stuffer described as USDA Certified Organic. Hero CTA -> /collections/best-sellers. No invented price.
emails.creativeDirection: Patriotic (navy #3C3B6E / red #B22234 / cream), red-white-blue stripe, 6-product best-seller grid with individual Shop Now, independence stocking band. Distinct from Jul 2 mushroom spotlight.

emails.theme: 36 Ounces of Flavor Your Kitchen Has Been Missing
emails.shortDescription: The bell pepper that upgrades everything. Soups, stir fries, omelets, pastas, you name it.
emails.notes: BEST-SELLER FEATURE. SKU 10054. Highlight versatility across cuisines and dishes.
emails.creativeDirection: Best-seller spotlight. Vibrant bell pepper imagery, recipe and cooking lifestyle.
